user.title: PaddiSense Setup
user.description:
Enter your PaddiSense license key to install. This will download and install PaddiSense from GitHub — internet access required.

After setup completes, restart Home Assistant to finish the installation.

data_description.license_key: Your license key in the format PADDISENSE.xxxx.xxxx

error.invalid_key: Invalid license key format. Keys start with PADDISENSE.

abort.already_installed: PaddiSense is already installed. Use the in-app update feature in PSM Settings to update.
